review:
This isn't your typical grocery store. This is the store you run to when you get a call from your husband calls you and says that his boss is coming over for dinner! It's full of great things that would be hard to find elsewhere. 

We stopped in to get something to take out for lunch. The choices are huge, deli counter, sushi, salad bar, sandwiches, pizza, and on & on. They also have a great wine and beer selection.

It's all good!
